AssertionError: Expected AG Grid headings ['Group', 'GSTIN', 'Username', 'Password', 'Status', 'Last Edited'], but got ['Group', 'GSTIN', 'Username', 'Password', 'Status', '']
assert ['Group', 'GS... 'Status', ''] == ['Group', 'GS...'Last Edited']
  
  At index 5 diff: '' != 'Last Edited'
  
  Full diff:
    [
        'Group',
        'GSTIN',
        'Username',
        'Password',
        'Status',
  -     'Last Edited',
  +     '',
    ]
verifying the GST table heading label name

AssertionError: Expected AG Grid headings ['Group', 'Airlines', 'PAN', 'Username', 'Password', 'App Code', 'OTP Email', 'OTP Email Password'], but got ['Group', 'Airlines', 'PAN', 'Username', 'Password']
assert ['Group', 'Ai...', 'Password'] == ['Group', 'Ai...pp Code', ...]
  
  Right contains 3 more items, first extra item: 'App Code'
  
  Full diff:
    [
        'Group',
        'Airlines',
        'PAN',
        'Username',
        'Password',
  -     'App Code',
  -     'OTP Email',
  -     'OTP Email Password',
    ]
verifying the airline table heading label name

AssertionError: Checkboxes and labels count mismatch
assert 1 == 5
 +  where 1 = len([<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="d9de94aa0c57a4149b81621b1d2afb9f", element="f.7BA89960C3A23C7E98474DE7716990A8.d.B849976A5C3BFFC58375A42F7019A992.e.107")>])
 +  and   5 = len(['Custom Sort Order', 'Workspace', 'PAN', 'GSTIN', 'Username'])

AssertionError: Expected GSTIN and  to be present after drag-and-drop.
assert ('GSTIN' in ['Group', 'CRM Field', 'Column Mapping', 'Username', 'Password', 'Status', ...] and '' in ['Group', 'CRM Field', 'Column Mapping', 'Username', 'Password', 'Status', ...])

AssertionError: Expected  and Airlines to be present after drag-and-drop.
assert ('' in ['Password', 'CRM Field', 'Group', 'Column Mapping', 'Airlines', 'PAN', ...])
